GHOST Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Requirements

        GHOST Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Requirements

        UID:
        GHOST-MEMORY-MERGE-ACTIVEBRIEF-BLACKBOARD

        0.1

        Title
        Statement

        SECTION
        		1
        1. Purpose and Scope
        TEXT
        This document defines the current Memory ActiveRetrievalBrief, deterministic memory reduction, query-time episodic compression, Memory Context synthesis, SuperPrompt handoff, and the explicit current boundary toward a future Blackboard capability.

        It owns current runtime transformation and continuity behavior after durable recording and candidate retrieval. It does not redefine durable MemoryRecord truth, vector ingestion, or document A3/A4 behavior.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.1
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-PARENT-CAPABILITY Parent Memory Capability
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ACTIVEBRIEF-SCOPE ActiveBrief Scope
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-COMPRESSION-SCOPE Runtime Compression Scope
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SYNTHESIS-SCOPE Memory Synthesis Scope

        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT
        Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST shall provide current memory-continuity and memory-synthesis functions that:
        1. build or propagate an ActiveRetrievalBrief during MemoryRecord capture;
        2. reduce Q/A text deterministically for continuity decisions;
        3. gate ActiveBrief updates using embedding similarity and a RAM-only pending-topic buffer;
        4. compress selected episodic memory against the effective retrieval query;
        5. synthesize episodic and semantic memory evidence into one runtime memory_context string; and
        6. expose an explicit boundary toward, but not implement, a future Blackboard capability.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.2
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-PARENT-CAPABILITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-PARENT-CAPABILITY
        Parent Memory Capability
        This document shall refine the Memory Management capability defined by 50_memory_management.sdoc and shall preserve the authority boundaries defined by 51_memory_recording_and_files.sdoc and 52_memory_ingestion_and_retrieval.sdoc.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.3
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ACTIVEBRIEF-SCOPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ACTIVEBRIEF-SCOPE
        ActiveBrief Scope
        ActiveRetrievalBrief requirements in this document shall cover creation, update, propagation, contributor tracking, relevance gating, and pending-topic handling performed during memory recording.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.4
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-COMPRESSION-SCOPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-COMPRESSION-SCOPE
        Runtime Compression Scope
        Runtime compression requirements in this document shall cover query reduction and query-anchored reduction of selected episodic Q/A candidates without modifying durable source records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.5
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SYNTHESIS-SCOPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SYNTHESIS-SCOPE
        Memory Synthesis Scope
        Memory synthesis requirements in this document shall cover evidence formatting, Agent Stack invocation, structured output parsing, diagnostics, and write-back of synthesized Memory Context.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.6
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-DURABLE-OWNERSHIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-DURABLE-OWNERSHIP
        No Durable Truth Ownership
        MemorySentenceReducer, MemoryCompressor, MemoryMergeSynthesizer, and the relevance gate shall not own .ragmem, .ragmeta.json, SQLite, or memory-vector truth.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.7
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-DOCUMENT-EVIDENCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-DOCUMENT-EVIDENCE
        No Document Evidence Ownership
        This document shall not assign document retrieval, reranking, A3 usefulness selection, A4 condensation, or S_CTX_MD ownership to Memory Management.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.8
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-FINAL-ANSWER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-FINAL-ANSWER
        No Final User Answer
        ActiveBrief and Memory Context agents shall produce backend context artifacts and shall not answer the current user request.
        SECTION
        		2
        2. Implementation Location Map and Functional Decomposition
        TEXT
        The current implementation is distributed across recording-time continuity components, retrieval-time compression and synthesis components, agent definitions, and SuperPrompt projection.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.1
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOCATION-MAP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOCATION-MAP
        Implementation Location Map
        The current implementation shall be traceable through these locations:
        - ragstream/memory/compression/memory_sentence_reducer.py: shared deterministic Q/A window reduction;
        - ragstream/memory/compression/memory_activebrief_relevance_gate.py: non-LLM ActiveBrief routing gate;
        - ragstream/memory/compression/memory_active_retrieval_brief.py: recording-time ActiveBrief orchestration;
        - ragstream/memory/compression/memory_compressor.py: query-time episodic compression;
        - ragstream/memory/memory_merge_synthesizer.py: runtime Memory Context synthesis;
        - data/agents/memory_activebrief_qa_summarizer/: ActiveBrief init/update agent definitions;
        - data/agents/memory_synthesizer/memory_synthesizer_001.json: Memory Context agent definition;
        - ragstream/memory/memory_manager.py: recording-time invocation and durable write authority;
        - ragstream/retrieval/retriever_mem.py: retrieval-time invocation and SuperPrompt write-back;
        - ragstream/orchestration/super_prompt.py and superprompt_projector.py: runtime fields and rendering.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.2
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-RECORDING-TIME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-RECORDING-TIME
        Recording-Time Functional Group
        ActiveBrief reduction, relevance gating, init/update agent execution, pending-topic maintenance, and stable ActiveBrief assignment shall execute as part of MemoryRecord capture before the new stable body is appended.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.3
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-RETRIEVAL-TIME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-RETRIEVAL-TIME
        Retrieval-Time Functional Group
        Query anchoring, episodic compression, evidence assembly, Memory Context synthesis, and MemoryContextPack update shall execute as runtime retrieval functions after memory candidates have been selected.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.4
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SHARED-REDUCER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SHARED-REDUCER
        Shared Reducer Boundary
        MemorySentenceReducer shall be the shared deterministic reduction component for recording-time centroid reduction and retrieval-time external-query-anchor reduction.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.5
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AGENT-STACK-USE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AGENT-STACK-USE
        Agent Stack Use
        ActiveBrief and Memory Context LLM calls shall resolve versioned AgentPrompt definitions through AgentFactory and shall invoke the provider through LLMClient as defined by 20_agent_stack.sdoc.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.6
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-STATE-OWNERS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-STATE-OWNERS
        State Ownership Map
        MemoryManager shall own pending-topic RAM state and durable ActiveBrief assignment; MemoryContextPack shall own run-local candidate and synthesis results; SuperPrompt shall own run-local final memory fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.7
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-UI-ALGORITHM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-UI-ALGORITHM
        No UI Algorithm Ownership
        Streamlit callbacks and views may trigger or display these functions but shall not own ActiveBrief routing, reduction, synthesis, or state-authority rules.
        SECTION
        		3
        3. ActiveRetrievalBrief Recording Position and Authority
        TEXT
        ActiveRetrievalBrief is a query-independent continuity artifact created or propagated when a new MemoryRecord is captured.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.1
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE ActiveBrief Operational Title
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-RECORDING-POSITION ActiveBrief Before Durable Append
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-MANAGER-AUTHORITY MemoryManager Write Authority
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-STABLE-BODY ActiveBrief Stable Body Fields
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-QUERY-INDEPENDENCE Query Independence
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-NO-RECORD-REWRITE No Prior Record Rewrite
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CAPTURE-FAILURE ActiveBrief Failure Isolation
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-IMPORTED-BRIEF Imported Shared Brief Assignment
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-IMPORT-NO-AUTO Imported Records Without Supplied Brief
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CURRENT-METADATA Current Record Metadata Payload
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT Initial Brief Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-GATE-DISABLED Gate Disabled Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NORMAL-UPDATE Related ActiveBrief Update Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SAFE-PASS Safe-Pass Update Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-UPDATE-CONTRIBUTORS Update Contributor Merge
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-UPDATE-BUFFER Update Clears Pending Buffer
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP Unrelated Q/A Skip Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NO-FABRICATION No Fabricated ActiveBrief Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-STABLE Contributor IDs as Stable Brief Trace
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION
        ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        ActiveRetrievalBrief shall be a compact, query-independent representation of the current working-conversation center for one memory history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.2
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE
        ActiveBrief Operational Title
        Each non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief produced by the current summarizer contract shall be accompanied by active_retrieval_brief_title as an operational backend title.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.3
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-RECORDING-POSITION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-RECORDING-POSITION
        ActiveBrief Before Durable Append
        MemoryManager.capture_pair shall attempt to build the new record ActiveBrief before appending that MemoryRecord stable body to .ragmem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.4
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-MANAGER-AUTHORITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-MANAGER-AUTHORITY
        MemoryManager Write Authority
        MemoryActiveRetrievalBriefBuilder shall return its result to MemoryManager and shall not write files, SQLite rows, or vectors directly.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.5
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-STABLE-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-STABLE-BODY
        ActiveBrief Stable Body Fields
        MemoryManager shall assign ActiveBrief title, body, and contributor IDs to the new MemoryRecord before persistence so those fields become part of the append-only .ragmem stable body.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.6
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-QUERY-INDEPENDENCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-QUERY-INDEPENDENCE
        Query Independence
        Recording-time ActiveBrief generation shall use the current record, prior clean ActiveBrief, record metadata, and pending-topic state and shall not use the later user retrieval query or document evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.7
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-NO-RECORD-REWRITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-NO-RECORD-REWRITE
        No Prior Record Rewrite
        Creating the ActiveBrief for record K shall not rewrite the stable body of earlier MemoryRecords.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.8
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CAPTURE-FAILURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CAPTURE-FAILURE
        ActiveBrief Failure Isolation
        If ActiveBrief generation raises an exception inside MemoryManager, MemoryManager shall log the developer failure when enabled and shall continue the durable MemoryRecord capture path without fabricating a brief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.9
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-IMPORTED-BRIEF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-IMPORTED-BRIEF
        Imported Shared Brief Assignment
        ChatGPT shared-link import may assign one user-supplied MemoryBrief title and body to every imported record; that assignment shall be distinguished from per-record ActiveBrief generation by the recording-time builder.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.10
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-IMPORT-NO-AUTO
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-IMPORT-NO-AUTO
        Imported Records Without Supplied Brief
        When a ChatGPT shared-link import contains no supplied MemoryBrief, the current import path shall persist imported records with empty ActiveBrief fields rather than silently running the normal per-record ActiveBrief builder.
        SECTION
        		4
        4. MemorySentenceReducer Contract
        TEXT
        MemorySentenceReducer performs deterministic sentence-window reduction while retaining vector evidence required by the ActiveBrief gate.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.1
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CONFIG Reducer Configuration Fields
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-SENTENCE-SPLIT Sentence Segmentation
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-WINDOWS Sentence Windows
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ALWAYS-EMBED Always Vectorize Prepared Windows
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CENTROID-MODE Centroid Reduction Mode
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-EXTERNAL-ANCHOR External Anchor Reduction Mode
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-BUDGET Q/A Budget Allocation
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-BELOW-BUDGET Below-Budget Preservation
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-SCORE Window Relevance Score
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-REDUNDANCY Window Redundancy Exclusion
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOKEN-FIT Window Token Fit
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOP-FALLBACK Top-Window Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ORDER Original Sentence Order Restoration
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-VECTOR-OUTPUT Surviving Vector Output
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-FALLBACK-SLICE Bounded Text Slice Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOKEN-COUNT Token Estimation
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-COSINE-SAFETY Cosine Safety
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION Reducer Runtime Output Only
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT
        Reducer Input Contract
        MemorySentenceReducer shall accept input_text and output_text and shall return ReducedQA containing reduced_question, reduced_answer, question_vectors, answer_vectors, and diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.2
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CONFIG
        Reducer Configuration Fields
        The reducer shall expose max_tokens_total, question_max_tokens, window_size_sentences, window_overlap_sentences, redundancy_threshold, and embedding_model as construction parameters.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.3
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-SENTENCE-SPLIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-SENTENCE-SPLIT
        Sentence Segmentation
        The reducer shall split text using sentence-ending punctuation and line breaks and shall omit empty sentence units.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.4
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-WINDOWS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-WINDOWS
        Sentence Windows
        The reducer shall form ordered sentence windows with window size at least one, overlap clamped below window size, and positive step equal to window size minus overlap.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.5
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ALWAYS-EMBED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ALWAYS-EMBED
        Always Vectorize Prepared Windows
        The reducer shall embed prepared question and answer windows even when the original side is already within its token budget so the resulting vectors remain available to the relevance gate.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.6
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CENTROID-MODE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-NO-VECTORS No-Vector Centroid Result
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CENTROID-MODE
        Centroid Reduction Mode
        reduce_with_centroid shall compute an anchor from the centroid of all compatible question and answer vectors and shall use that anchor for query-independent reduction.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.7
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-EXTERNAL-ANCHOR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-EXTERNAL-ANCHOR
        External Anchor Reduction Mode
        reduce_with_anchor shall reduce the prepared Q/A against a caller-supplied anchor vector and shall identify the diagnostic mode as external_anchor.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.8
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-NO-VECTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-CENTROID-MODE Centroid Reduction Mode
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-NO-VECTORS
        No-Vector Centroid Result
        When centroid mode has no Q/A vectors, the reducer shall return empty reduced text and vectors with a no_vectors diagnostic rather than fabricate content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.9
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-BUDGET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-BUDGET
        Q/A Budget Allocation
        The reducer shall allocate the question share proportionally to original Q/A token estimates, cap it by question_max_tokens, provide a positive fallback for a non-empty question, and allocate the remaining total budget to the answer.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.10
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-BELOW-BUDGET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-BELOW-BUDGET
        Below-Budget Preservation
        When one side is already within its allocated budget, the reducer shall preserve that side text and all of its prepared vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.11
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-SCORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-SCORE
        Window Relevance Score
        For a side requiring reduction, the reducer shall rank each compatible window by cosine similarity to the active anchor vector.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.12
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-REDUNDANCY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-REDUNDANCY
        Window Redundancy Exclusion
        The reducer shall skip a candidate window when its cosine similarity to any already selected window is greater than or equal to redundancy_threshold.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.13
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOKEN-FIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOKEN-FIT
        Window Token Fit
        The reducer shall skip a candidate window whose estimated tokens would cause selected window tokens to exceed the side budget.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.14
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOP-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOP-FALLBACK
        Top-Window Fallback
        If no ranked window can be selected but scored windows exist, the reducer shall retain the highest-scoring window as the selection fallback.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.15
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ORDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-REDUCER AC: Reducer Order and Budget
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ORDER
        Original Sentence Order Restoration
        The reducer shall reconstruct reduced text from selected sentence indexes in their original source order rather than relevance-rank order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.16
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-VECTOR-OUTPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-VECTOR-OUTPUT
        Surviving Vector Output
        When reduction occurs, returned question_vectors and answer_vectors shall correspond to the selected windows rather than all discarded windows.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.17
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-FALLBACK-SLICE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-FALLBACK-SLICE
        Bounded Text Slice Fallback
        When over-budget text cannot be reconstructed from valid windows, the reducer shall use the current bounded character-slice fallback and shall not create new semantic content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.18
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOKEN-COUNT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-TOKEN-COUNT
        Token Estimation
        The reducer shall use cl100k_base through tiktoken when available and shall otherwise estimate tokens as the ceiling of character count divided by four.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.19
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-COSINE-SAFETY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-COSINE-SAFETY
        Cosine Safety
        Cosine comparison shall return zero for empty vectors, dimensional mismatch, or zero vector norms.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.20
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-INPUT Reducer Input Contract
        GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION
        Reducer Runtime Output Only
        Reducer output shall not modify the original MemoryRecord input_text or output_text.
        SECTION
        		5
        5. ActiveBrief Previous-State Selection
        TEXT
        The ActiveBrief builder selects one previous clean brief from the active in-memory history before deciding how the new record affects continuity.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.1
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-SKIP-BLACK-RECORD Skip Black Source Record
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-SKIP-EMPTY Skip Empty Previous Brief
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-BLACK-CONTRIBUTOR Reject Brief with Black Contributor
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CONTRIBUTOR-FALLBACK Contributor Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-NO-PREVIOUS No Previous Clean Brief
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN
        Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        The builder shall scan previous records from newest to oldest and shall select the first eligible non-empty ActiveBrief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.2
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-SKIP-BLACK-RECORD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-SKIP-BLACK-RECORD
        Skip Black Source Record
        A previous record whose current tag is Black shall not supply the previous clean ActiveBrief to the builder.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.3
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-SKIP-EMPTY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-SKIP-EMPTY
        Skip Empty Previous Brief
        A previous record with an empty active_retrieval_brief shall not be selected as the previous clean brief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.4
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-BLACK-CONTRIBUTOR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-BLACK AC: Black Contributor Exclusion
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-BLACK-CONTRIBUTOR
        Reject Brief with Black Contributor
        The builder shall reject a previous ActiveBrief when any listed contributor ID belongs to a previous record currently tagged Black.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.5
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CONTRIBUTOR-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CONTRIBUTOR-FALLBACK
        Contributor Fallback
        When an otherwise eligible previous brief has no contributor IDs, the builder shall use the selected previous record ID as its contributor list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.6
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-NO-PREVIOUS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-PREVIOUS-SCAN Newest-to-Oldest Previous Brief Scan
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-NO-PREVIOUS
        No Previous Clean Brief
        When no eligible previous clean ActiveBrief exists, the builder shall route the new record through initial ActiveBrief creation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.7
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CURRENT-METADATA
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-CURRENT-METADATA
        Current Record Metadata Payload
        The ActiveBrief agent metadata payload shall include record_id, parent_id, creation time, source, tag, retrieval source mode, active project, automatic keywords, user keywords, and embedded-file snapshot from the current MemoryRecord.
        SECTION
        		6
        6. ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        TEXT
        The non-LLM gate determines whether to update the current ActiveBrief, confirm a topic shift, or propagate the existing brief without an LLM call.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.1
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-QA-VECTORS Reused Q/A Vectors
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-BRIEF-CENTER ActiveBrief Center
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-PREVIOUS No-Previous Pass Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-QA No-Q/A-Vector Skip Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-SAFE-PASS Missing ActiveBrief Center Safe Pass
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-COSINE-SCORES Q/A-to-Center Scores
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-SMALL Top-Score Selection for Four or Fewer
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-MEDIUM Top-Score Selection for Five through Twenty
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-LARGE Top-Score Selection Above Twenty
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ACTIVE-PASS ActiveBrief Update Threshold
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-PENDING-CENTER Pending Topic Center
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOPIC-SHIFT Pending Topic Shift Threshold
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-SKIP Skip and Update Pending Topic Route
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-DIAGNOSTICS Gate Diagnostics
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-LLM Gate Is Non-LLM
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT
        ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        When enabled and a previous clean ActiveBrief exists, MemoryActiveBriefRelevanceGate shall evaluate reduced current Q/A vectors against the previous ActiveBrief and optional pending-topic center before an ActiveBrief update agent is called.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.2
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-QA-VECTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-QA-VECTORS
        Reused Q/A Vectors
        The gate shall reuse question_vectors and answer_vectors produced by MemorySentenceReducer and shall not re-embed the current Q/A solely for gating.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.3
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-BRIEF-CENTER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-BRIEF-CENTER
        ActiveBrief Center
        The gate shall split the previous ActiveBrief into sentence windows, embed those windows, and calculate their compatible-vector centroid as the ActiveBrief comparison center.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.4
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-PREVIOUS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-PREVIOUS
        No-Previous Pass Route
        When no previous ActiveBrief is supplied, the gate shall return a pass decision with route init_no_previous_activebrief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.5
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-QA
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-QA
        No-Q/A-Vector Skip Route
        When a previous brief exists but current Q/A vectors are empty, the gate shall return should_update_activebrief false with route skip_no_qa_vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.6
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-SAFE-PASS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-SAFE-PASS
        Missing ActiveBrief Center Safe Pass
        When the gate cannot construct an ActiveBrief center, it shall return a safe pass with route activebrief_safe_pass rather than block the update.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.7
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-COSINE-SCORES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-COSINE-SCORES
        Q/A-to-Center Scores
        The gate shall calculate cosine similarity between each current question/answer vector and the active comparison center.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.8
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-SMALL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-SMALL
        Top-Score Selection for Four or Fewer
        For one through four Q/A scores, the gate shall use all scores in its top-score mean.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.9
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-MEDIUM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-MEDIUM
        Top-Score Selection for Five through Twenty
        For five through twenty Q/A scores, the gate shall use the top four scores in its top-score mean.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.10
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-LARGE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPCOUNT AC: Gate Top-Score Counts
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-LARGE
        Top-Score Selection Above Twenty
        For more than twenty Q/A scores, the gate shall use floor(n divided by five), with at least one score, in its top-score mean.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.11
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ACTIVE-PASS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ACTIVE-PASS
        ActiveBrief Update Threshold
        When the ActiveBrief comparison top-score mean is greater than or equal to activebrief_threshold, the gate shall route activebrief_update.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.12
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-PENDING-CENTER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-PENDING-CENTER
        Pending Topic Center
        If the current Q/A fails the ActiveBrief threshold and a pending center exists, the gate shall evaluate current Q/A vectors against that pending-topic center using the same top-score rule.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.13
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOPIC-SHIFT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOPIC-SHIFT
        Pending Topic Shift Threshold
        When the pending-topic comparison top-score mean is greater than or equal to pending_topic_threshold, the gate shall route pending_topic_shift.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.14
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-SKIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-SKIP
        Skip and Update Pending Topic Route
        When current Q/A fails both applicable thresholds, the gate shall route skip_and_update_pending_topic and shall not authorize the normal ActiveBrief update call.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.15
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-DIAGNOSTICS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-DIAGNOSTICS
        Gate Diagnostics
        Gate diagnostics shall preserve route, reason, threshold values, score counts, selected top scores, and score summaries without requiring full vector logging.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.16
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-LLM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-ROOT ActiveBrief Relevance Gate
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-NO-LLM
        Gate Is Non-LLM
        The relevance gate shall make its route deterministically from embeddings, thresholds, and pending state and shall not call an LLM.
        SECTION
        		7
        7. ActiveBrief Init, Update, Skip, and Topic-Shift Routing
        TEXT
        MemoryActiveRetrievalBriefBuilder maps previous-state and gate results to one of the current recording-time routes.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.1
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT-CONTRIBUTOR Initial Contributor
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT-BUFFER Initial Route Clears Pending Buffer
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-INIT AC: Initial ActiveBrief
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT
        Initial Brief Route
        If no previous clean ActiveBrief exists, the builder shall invoke the configured init agent using reduced current question, reduced current answer, current record metadata, and required-output text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.2
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT-CONTRIBUTOR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT Initial Brief Route
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT-CONTRIBUTOR
        Initial Contributor
        The initial ActiveBrief contributor list shall contain the current record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.3
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT-BUFFER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT Initial Brief Route
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT-BUFFER
        Initial Route Clears Pending Buffer
        The initial ActiveBrief route shall return an empty pending-topic buffer.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.4
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-GATE-DISABLED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-GATE-DISABLED
        Gate Disabled Route
        When a previous clean brief exists and the relevance gate is disabled, the builder shall invoke the update agent using the previous brief and current reduced Q/A and shall report route gate_disabled.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.5
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NORMAL-UPDATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RELATED AC: Related ActiveBrief Update
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NORMAL-UPDATE
        Related ActiveBrief Update Route
        For gate route activebrief_update, the builder shall invoke the update agent with the previous brief and current reduced Q/A.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.6
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SAFE-PASS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SAFE-PASS
        Safe-Pass Update Route
        A gate safe-pass result authorizing update shall follow the builder update path and shall not be treated as a skipped Q/A.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.7
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-UPDATE-CONTRIBUTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-UPDATE-CONTRIBUTORS
        Update Contributor Merge
        For a normal or gate-disabled update, contributor IDs shall be the ordered de-duplicated merge of prior contributor IDs and the current record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.8
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-UPDATE-BUFFER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-UPDATE-BUFFER
        Update Clears Pending Buffer
        A successful normal, safe-pass, or gate-disabled update route shall return an empty pending-topic buffer.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.9
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-LABELS Topic-Shift Payload Labels
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-CONTRIBUTORS Topic-Shift Contributor Merge
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-BUFFER Topic Shift Clears Pending Buffer
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPIC AC: Confirmed Topic Shift
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT
        Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
        For gate route pending_topic_shift, the builder shall combine pending reduced Q/A and current reduced Q/A and shall invoke the configured update agent with the previous ActiveBrief plus that combined reduced content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.10
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-LABELS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-LABELS
        Topic-Shift Payload Labels
        The combined topic-shift payload shall distinguish pending question, current question, pending answer, and current answer with the current explicit labels.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.11
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-CONTRIBUTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-CONTRIBUTORS
        Topic-Shift Contributor Merge
        The topic-shift contributor list shall be the ordered de-duplicated merge of prior contributors, the pending record_id, and the current record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.12
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-BUFFER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-BUFFER
        Topic Shift Clears Pending Buffer
        A confirmed topic-shift route shall return an empty pending-topic buffer after the agent call.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.13
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP-LLM-FLAG Skipped LLM Diagnostic
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SKIP AC: Unrelated Q/A Skip
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP
        Unrelated Q/A Skip Route
        For a non-update gate route, the builder shall skip the ActiveBrief LLM call, copy the previous ActiveBrief title/body/contributor IDs into the new record result, and create a new pending-topic buffer from the current reduced Q/A.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.14
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP-LLM-FLAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP Unrelated Q/A Skip Route
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP-LLM-FLAG
        Skipped LLM Diagnostic
        The skip route shall report activebrief_llm_skipped true and shall preserve the gate route in activebrief_gate_route.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.15
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NO-FABRICATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NO-FABRICATION
        No Fabricated ActiveBrief Fallback
        If an init or update agent invocation or parse fails, the builder shall propagate the failure to MemoryManager and shall not invent an ActiveBrief result.
        SECTION
        		8
        8. Pending Topic Buffer and Contributor Traceability
        TEXT
        The pending-topic buffer supports detection of a stable new topic across consecutive skipped Q/A pairs and is not durable memory truth.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.1
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CONTENT Pending Buffer Content
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CENTER Pending Center Calculation
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-REPLACEMENT Pending Buffer Replacement
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-NEW Clear on New History
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-LOAD Clear on History Load
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-IMPORT Clear on Imported History
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-NOT-BLACKBOARD Pending Buffer Is Not Blackboard
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM
        RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        MemoryManager.pending_activebrief_topic_buffer shall remain RAM-only and shall not be written to .ragmem, .ragmeta.json, SQLite, or the memory vector store.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.2
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CONTENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CONTENT
        Pending Buffer Content
        The pending buffer shall contain current record_id, creation time, reduced question, reduced answer, question vectors, answer vectors, centroid center_vector, and vector_count.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.3
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CENTER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CENTER
        Pending Center Calculation
        The pending center_vector shall be the centroid of compatible current reduced question and answer vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.4
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-REPLACEMENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-REPLACEMENT
        Pending Buffer Replacement
        Each skip route shall replace the prior pending-topic buffer with the current skipped Q/A buffer returned by the builder.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.5
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-NEW
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-NEW
        Clear on New History
        Starting a new memory history shall reset pending_activebrief_topic_buffer to an empty dictionary.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.6
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-LOAD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-LOAD
        Clear on History Load
        Loading a memory history shall reset pending_activebrief_topic_buffer and shall not reconstruct it from persisted files.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.7
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-IMPORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-CLEAR-IMPORT
        Clear on Imported History
        Persisting an imported ChatGPT history shall set pending_activebrief_topic_buffer to an empty dictionary.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.8
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-NOT-BLACKBOARD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-PENDING-RAM RAM-Only Pending Topic State
        GHOST-MEM-PENDING-NOT-BLACKBOARD
        Pending Buffer Is Not Blackboard
        The pending-topic buffer shall not be described as a Blackboard because it is a single-purpose, active-history, RAM-only continuity aid without shared task coordination or multi-component posting semantics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.9
        GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-STABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-UNIQUE Contributor De-Duplication
        • GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-NO-SEMANTIC-PROOF Contributor Meaning Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-STABLE
        Contributor IDs as Stable Brief Trace
        ActiveBrief contributor IDs shall identify the MemoryRecords whose accepted content contributed to the current stable brief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.10
        GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-UNIQUE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-STABLE Contributor IDs as Stable Brief Trace
        GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-UNIQUE
        Contributor De-Duplication
        Contributor merge shall preserve first occurrence order and shall omit blank and duplicate record IDs.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.11
        GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-NO-SEMANTIC-PROOF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-STABLE Contributor IDs as Stable Brief Trace
        GHOST-MEM-CONTRIBUTOR-NO-SEMANTIC-PROOF
        Contributor Meaning Boundary
        Contributor membership shall record builder traceability and shall not by itself assert sentence-level provenance for every phrase in an LLM-produced ActiveBrief.
        SECTION
        		9
        9. ActiveBrief Agent Definitions and Output Contract
        TEXT
        The current init and update agents are versioned JSON synthesizers with distinct inputs and the same two-field output schema.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.1
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-DEFINITION ActiveRetrievalBrief Definition
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-INIT-BINDINGS Init Agent Bindings
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-UPDATE-BINDINGS Update Agent Bindings
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-OUTPUT ActiveBrief Output Schema
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-NO-QA-SUMMARY No Separate Q/A Summary
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-NO-ANSWER No User-Facing Answer
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-FACT-BOUNDARY Provided-Evidence Boundary
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-CORRECTIONS Correction and Rejection Preservation
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-EMOTION Emotional Wording Boundary
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-TITLE-RULE Operational Title Rule
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-MODEL Current ActiveBrief Model Configuration
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-CALL ActiveBrief LLM Invocation
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-LIMIT-CONFLICT Current ActiveBrief Limit Inconsistency
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID
        ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        The current ActiveBrief builder shall resolve agent_id memory_activebrief_qa_summarizer with distinct configured init and update version identifiers.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.2
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-INIT-BINDINGS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-INIT-BINDINGS
        Init Agent Bindings
        The init agent shall bind reduced_question, reduced_answer, memory_record_metadata, and required_output and shall not require a previous ActiveBrief.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.3
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-UPDATE-BINDINGS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-UPDATE-BINDINGS
        Update Agent Bindings
        The update agent shall bind previous_active_retrieval_brief, reduced_question, reduced_answer, memory_record_metadata, and required_output.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.4
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-OUTPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-OUTPUT
        ActiveBrief Output Schema
        Both ActiveBrief agent definitions shall return JSON containing only active_retrieval_brief_title and active_retrieval_brief as declared output fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.5
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-NO-QA-SUMMARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-NO-QA-SUMMARY
        No Separate Q/A Summary
        The ActiveBrief agent contract shall not create a separate qa_summary field.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.6
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-NO-ANSWER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-NO-ANSWER
        No User-Facing Answer
        The ActiveBrief agents shall not answer the original request, speak to the user, or produce final answer text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.7
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-FACT-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-FACT-BOUNDARY
        Provided-Evidence Boundary
        The ActiveBrief agents shall use only the supplied reduced Q/A, current metadata, and, for update, previous clean ActiveBrief and shall not import outside knowledge.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.8
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-CORRECTIONS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-CORRECTIONS
        Correction and Rejection Preservation
        The agent instructions shall treat explicit corrections as high-importance constraints and explicit rejected interpretations as negative constraints when present in supplied evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.9
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-EMOTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-EMOTION
        Emotional Wording Boundary
        The agent instructions shall treat insults, frustration, short rejection, or emotional wording as feedback signals rather than automatically converting them into new topic content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.10
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-TITLE-RULE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-TITLE-RULE
        Operational Title Rule
        The current agent definitions shall request a neutral factual operational title of ten to twenty words describing the stable working-conversation center.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.11
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-MODEL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-MODEL
        Current ActiveBrief Model Configuration
        The current init and update JSON definitions shall configure provider openai, model gpt-5-mini, temperature zero, JSON response format, and max_tokens 600.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.12
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-CALL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-CALL
        ActiveBrief LLM Invocation
        The builder shall compose the selected AgentPrompt, call LLMClient.responses with the agent model and maximum output tokens, minimal reasoning effort, metadata return enabled, and the configured prompt cache key, then parse through AgentPrompt.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.13
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-LIMIT-CONFLICT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-ID ActiveBrief Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEAGENT-LIMIT-CONFLICT
        Current ActiveBrief Limit Inconsistency
        The current baseline shall record that runtime_config target_brief_tokens and builder required-output text use about 700 tokens while the current init/update agent hard rules specify an absolute maximum of 500 tokens.

        The implementation and requirements shall not claim one unified effective limit until this inconsistency is resolved in the versioned configuration and agent definitions.
        SECTION
        		10
        10. Runtime Memory Compression
        TEXT
        MemoryCompressor performs query-dependent reduction of selected episodic Q/A candidates before Memory Context synthesis.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.1
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-CONFIG Compression Configuration
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-CURRENT-SCOPE Current Episodic-Only Compression
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-DISABLED Compression Disabled Passthrough
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-CLEAN Effective Query Normalization
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-BELOW Below-Budget Query Preservation
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-ORDER Query Sentence Order
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-SKIP Oversized Query Sentence Skip
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-FALLBACK Query Fallback Slice
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-EMBED-ONCE Single Query Anchor Embedding
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-NO-ANCHOR Missing Query Anchor Passthrough
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-PRESERVE-ORIGINAL Original Episodic Text Preservation
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-MODE Compression Mode Metadata
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-NO-STORE-WRITE No Compression Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT
        Runtime Memory Compressor
        MemoryCompressor shall receive runtime configuration and shall produce query-dependent compressed fields without modifying durable MemoryRecord truth.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.2
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-CONFIG
        Compression Configuration
        MemoryCompressor shall consume the memory_compression section, including global enabled, effective-query maximum tokens and embedding model, and episodic reduction enablement, total budget, question budget, windowing, and redundancy threshold.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.3
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-CURRENT-SCOPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-CURRENT-SCOPE
        Current Episodic-Only Compression
        The current compressor shall operate on selected episodic candidates only and shall not compress working-memory candidates, Direct Recall candidates, or semantic memory chunks in the current retrieval flow.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.4
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-DISABLED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-DISABLED
        Compression Disabled Passthrough
        When global or episodic compression is disabled, compress_episodic_candidates shall return the candidate list without adding compressed fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.5
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-CLEAN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-CLEAN
        Effective Query Normalization
        The compressor shall strip the effective retrieval query before reducing or embedding it.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.6
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-BELOW
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-BELOW
        Below-Budget Query Preservation
        When the effective query is within query_max_tokens, query reduction shall preserve it unchanged.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.7
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-ORDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-ORDER
        Query Sentence Order
        When the effective query exceeds its budget, deterministic query reduction shall inspect sentences in original order and append each sentence that fits the remaining budget.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.8
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-SKIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-SKIP
        Oversized Query Sentence Skip
        A query sentence that would exceed the configured query budget shall be skipped rather than partially included in the normal sentence-selection path.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.9
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-FALLBACK
        Query Fallback Slice
        If no complete sentence fits, query reduction shall use the current bounded first-sentence character slice without generating new content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.10
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-EMBED-ONCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-QUERY-EMBED-ONCE
        Single Query Anchor Embedding
        After deterministic query reduction, the compressor shall embed the reduced query once and shall use that vector as the external anchor for all selected episodic candidates in the run.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.11
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-NO-ANCHOR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-NO-ANCHOR
        Missing Query Anchor Passthrough
        When no query anchor vector can be produced, the compressor shall return episodic candidates unchanged rather than fabricate compressed evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.12
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-PRESERVE-ORIGINAL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-COMPRESS AC: Query-Anchored Episodic Compression
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-PRESERVE-ORIGINAL
        Original Episodic Text Preservation
        Compressed candidates shall retain original input_text and output_text and shall add compressed_input_text and compressed_output_text as runtime fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.13
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-MODE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-MODE
        Compression Mode Metadata
        Each compressed episodic candidate shall identify memory_compression_mode as query_anchor_episode and shall include query and reducer diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.14
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-NO-STORE-WRITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-ROOT Runtime Memory Compressor
        GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-NO-STORE-WRITE
        No Compression Persistence
        MemoryCompressor shall not update .ragmem, .ragmeta.json, SQLite, or memory vectors with query-dependent compressed text.
        SECTION
        		11
        11. MemoryMergeSynthesizer Inputs and Evidence Construction
        TEXT
        MemoryMergeSynthesizer receives bounded runtime evidence and constructs one explicit agent payload.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.1
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CONFIG Synthesis Configuration
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EXPLICIT-CONFIG Current Runtime Configuration Injection
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-DISABLED Disabled Synthesis
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-CAP Episodic Input Cap
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-SEMANTIC-CAP Semantic Chunk Input Cap
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES Current Synthesized Evidence Classes
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-FORMAT Episodic Evidence Format
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-SEMANTIC-FORMAT Semantic Evidence Format
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-EVIDENCE No Evidence Skip
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-PAYLOAD Synthesis Payload
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ACTIVEBRIEF-REFERENCE ActiveBrief Reference Boundary
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT
        Memory Context Synthesizer
        MemoryMergeSynthesizer shall synthesize one query-relevant memory_context string from current episodic candidates and semantic memory chunks using the effective retrieval query and ActiveRetrievalBrief as an orientation and anti-duplication reference.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.2
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CONFIG
        Synthesis Configuration
        The synthesizer shall consume memory_merge_synthesizer enabled, agent_id, agent_version, target_context_tokens, max_episodic_records, max_semantic_chunks, and prompt_cache_key.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.3
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EXPLICIT-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EXPLICIT-CONFIG
        Current Runtime Configuration Injection
        The current MemoryRetriever shall construct MemoryMergeSynthesizer with the active runtime_config dictionary so the normal retrieval path does not depend on the synthesizer fallback configuration loader.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.4
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-DISABLED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-DISABLED
        Disabled Synthesis
        When synthesis is disabled, the synthesizer shall skip the LLM and return empty memory_context with a disabled diagnostic.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.5
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-CAP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-CAP
        Episodic Input Cap
        Before evidence formatting, the synthesizer shall retain at most the first max_episodic_records candidates in their existing order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.6
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-SEMANTIC-CAP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-SEMANTIC-CAP
        Semantic Chunk Input Cap
        Before evidence formatting, the synthesizer shall retain at most the first max_semantic_chunks in their existing order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.7
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-WORKING Working Memory Not Synthesizer Input
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-DIRECT Direct Recall Not Synthesizer Input
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNTH-INPUT AC: Current Synthesis Evidence Classes
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES
        Current Synthesized Evidence Classes
        The current synthesizer evidence source shall include reduced episodic episodes and semantic memory chunks.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.8
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-WORKING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES Current Synthesized Evidence Classes
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-WORKING
        Working Memory Not Synthesizer Input
        The current synthesizer shall not receive MemoryContextPack.working_memory_candidates as memory_evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.9
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-DIRECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES Current Synthesized Evidence Classes
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-DIRECT
        Direct Recall Not Synthesizer Input
        The current synthesizer shall not receive MemoryContextPack.direct_recall_candidate as memory_evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.10
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-FORMAT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-COMPRESSED-FIRST Compressed Episodic Text Priority
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-FORMAT
        Episodic Evidence Format
        For each episodic candidate, evidence text shall identify episode index, record_id, optional tag/source/score, and available QUESTION and ANSWER blocks.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.11
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-COMPRESSED-FIRST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-EPISODIC-FORMAT Episodic Evidence Format
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-COMPRESSED-FIRST
        Compressed Episodic Text Priority
        Episodic evidence formatting shall use compressed_input_text and compressed_output_text when present and shall otherwise fall back to original input_text and output_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.12
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-SEMANTIC-FORMAT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-SEMANTIC-FORMAT
        Semantic Evidence Format
        For each semantic chunk, evidence text shall identify available vector_id, record_id, role, score, and TEXT content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.13
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-EVIDENCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-EVIDENCE AC: Empty Evidence
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-EVIDENCE
        No Evidence Skip
        When the formatted episodic and semantic evidence text is empty, the synthesizer shall skip the LLM and return empty memory_context with reason no_memory_evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.14
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-PAYLOAD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-PAYLOAD
        Synthesis Payload
        The synthesis payload shall contain effective_retrieval_query_text, active_retrieval_brief_title, active_retrieval_brief, memory_evidence, and required_output.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.15
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ACTIVEBRIEF-REFERENCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ANTI-DUP-NATURE Anti-Duplication Instruction Nature
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ACTIVEBRIEF-REFERENCE
        ActiveBrief Reference Boundary
        ActiveRetrievalBrief shall be passed as orientation and anti-duplication reference and shall not be treated as a substitute for missing episodic or semantic evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.16
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ANTI-DUP-NATURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ACTIVEBRIEF-REFERENCE ActiveBrief Reference Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ANTI-DUP-NATURE
        Anti-Duplication Instruction Nature
        ActiveBrief anti-duplication is currently an instruction to the synthesizer agent and shall not be represented as a deterministic overlap detector.
        SECTION
        		12
        12. Memory Synthesizer Agent Contract and Output
        TEXT
        The current memory_synthesizer_001 agent produces one structured backend field and is constrained to provided evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.1
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-ROOT Memory Context Synthesizer
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-TYPE Memory Synthesizer Agent Type
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-MODEL Current Memory Synthesizer Model
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-BINDINGS Memory Synthesizer Bindings
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-OUTPUT Memory Context Output Schema
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-QUERY-RELEVANCE Query-Relevant Context
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-PRESERVE-FACTS Concrete Memory Fact Preservation
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-DEDUPE Evidence De-Duplication Instruction
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-INVENTION No Invented Memory
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-ANSWER Backend Context Only
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-CALL Memory Synthesis Invocation
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-SUCCESS Successful Synthesis Result
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-DIAGNOSTICS Successful Synthesis Diagnostics
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-FAILURE Synthesis Failure Result
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-FABRICATION No Fabricated Context Fallback
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID
        Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        The current synthesizer shall resolve agent_id memory_synthesizer and agent version memory_synthesizer_001.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.2
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-TYPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-TYPE
        Memory Synthesizer Agent Type
        The current agent definition shall identify the agent as a Synthesizer named Memory Context Synthesizer.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.3
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-MODEL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-MODEL
        Current Memory Synthesizer Model
        The current agent definition shall configure provider openai, model gpt-5-mini, temperature zero, max_tokens 1200, and JSON response format.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.4
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-BINDINGS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-BINDINGS
        Memory Synthesizer Bindings
        The agent definition shall bind effective retrieval query, optional ActiveBrief title, optional ActiveBrief body, memory evidence, and required-output instructions.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.5
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-OUTPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-OUTPUT
        Memory Context Output Schema
        The agent output schema shall declare one result field named memory_context and shall not declare a final answer field.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.6
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-QUERY-RELEVANCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-QUERY-RELEVANCE
        Query-Relevant Context
        The agent instructions shall retain only memory evidence connected to the effective retrieval query and shall return an empty memory_context when no useful evidence exists.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.7
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-PRESERVE-FACTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-PRESERVE-FACTS
        Concrete Memory Fact Preservation
        When relevant, the agent instructions shall preserve concrete names, technical entities, decisions, constraints, corrections, and rejected interpretations from supplied memory evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.8
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-DEDUPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-DEDUPE
        Evidence De-Duplication Instruction
        The agent instructions shall combine duplicate episodic and semantic evidence instead of repeating the same point.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.9
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-INVENTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-INVENTION
        No Invented Memory
        The agent shall not invent facts, preferences, project decisions, files, or implementation status and shall not import outside knowledge.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.10
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-ANSWER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-ANSWER
        Backend Context Only
        The agent shall not answer the original request, address the user, or produce a final user-facing response.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.11
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-CALL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-CALL
        Memory Synthesis Invocation
        MemoryMergeSynthesizer shall compose the configured AgentPrompt, call LLMClient.responses with minimal reasoning effort, metadata return enabled, and the configured prompt-cache key, and shall parse the returned content through AgentPrompt.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.12
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-SUCCESS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-SUCCESS
        Successful Synthesis Result
        On successful parse, the synthesizer shall return stripped memory_context, synthesis diagnostics, and memory_synthesis_llm_skipped false.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.13
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-DIAGNOSTICS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-DIAGNOSTICS
        Successful Synthesis Diagnostics
        Successful synthesis diagnostics shall include reason synthesized, configured target, selected input counts, output character count, provider usage, model name, status, and incomplete reason when available.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.14
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-FAILURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-FAILURE AC: Synthesis Failure
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-FAILURE
        Synthesis Failure Result
        If composition, provider call, or parse raises an exception, the synthesizer shall return empty memory_context, a synthesis_failed diagnostic containing the error and input counts, and memory_synthesis_llm_skipped true.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.15
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-FABRICATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-ID Memory Synthesizer Agent Identity
        GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-NO-FABRICATION
        No Fabricated Context Fallback
        A failed or skipped synthesis shall not be replaced with an invented deterministic Memory Context.
        SECTION
        		13
        13. MemoryContextPack and SuperPrompt Handoff
        TEXT
        MemoryRetriever stores raw candidate classes and synthesis output separately and projects only the synthesized context into the normal prompt view.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.1
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PACK
        Pack Synthesis Assignment
        After synthesis, MemoryRetriever shall store the returned memory_context and synthesis diagnostics through MemoryContextPack.set_synthesized_memory_context.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.2
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SP-TEXT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-HANDOFF AC: SuperPrompt Memory Handoff
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SP-TEXT
        SuperPrompt Memory Context Text
        MemoryRetriever shall assign MemoryContextPack.synthesized_memory_context to SuperPrompt.memory_context_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.3
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SP-PACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SP-PACK
        SuperPrompt Raw Memory Pack
        MemoryRetriever shall retain the full MemoryContextPack object and its dictionary/debug representations separately from memory_context_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.4
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-ACTIVEBRIEF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-ACTIVEBRIEF
