        SuperPrompt ActiveBrief Snapshot
        MemoryRetriever shall store the latest current eligible ActiveBrief title and body in the dedicated SuperPrompt fields and extras independently of synthesized Memory Context.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.5
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-RENDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SUPPORTING Supporting Context Semantics
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-RENDER
        Normal Memory Context Rendering
        SuperPromptProjector normal rendering shall use memory_context_text under the Memory Context section and shall not render raw MemoryContextPack debug Markdown by default.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.6
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SUPPORTING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-RENDER Normal Memory Context Rendering
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SUPPORTING
        Supporting Context Semantics
        Rendered Memory Context shall be identified as supporting context and shall not override the current user task or explicit current constraints.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.7
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-ACTIVEBRIEF-MODE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-ACTIVEBRIEF-MODE
        ActiveBrief Projection Mode Dependency
        Final ActiveBrief inclusion shall follow the deterministic final_prompt_mode and relation decision prepared by 30_preprocessing_prompt_functions.sdoc rather than being independently reclassified by MemoryMerge.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.8
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PERMISSION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-PERMISSION AC: Memory Permission
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PERMISSION
        Memory Context Permission Dependency
        Memory synthesis and final projection shall honor PreProcessing allow_memory_context and memory_context_policy; a request with memory context disabled shall not receive synthesized memory_context_text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.9
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-DOC-MUTATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-DOC-MUTATION
        No Document Context Mutation
        Memory synthesis and handoff shall not overwrite document S_CTX_MD, document stage views, or document selection IDs.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.10
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-STAGE-CLAIM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-STAGE-CLAIM
        No Independent Pipeline Stage Claim
        Current MemoryMerge write-back shall not claim a separate top-level document pipeline stage solely because compression and synthesis occur inside MemoryRetriever.run.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.11
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-PERSIST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RUNTIME-ONLY AC: Runtime Artifact Non-Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-PERSIST
        No Runtime Context Persistence
        memory_context_text, synthesis diagnostics, compressed episodic fields, and MemoryContextPack shall remain run-local artifacts and shall not be appended to .ragmem as new durable truth.
        SECTION
        		14
        14. Configuration Governance and Current Consumption
        TEXT
        Current memory transformation behavior combines versioned runtime JSON, versioned agent JSON, and some Python defaults; requirements distinguish consumed settings from merely present values.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.1
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-RUNTIME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-RUNTIME
        Runtime Configuration Source
        Normal application startup shall load ragstream/config/runtime_config.json and shall pass the resulting dictionary into MemoryRetriever and its retrieval-time compressor and synthesizer components.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.2
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LOAD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LOAD
        Recording-Time ActiveBrief Configuration Load
        The current recording-time ActiveBrief builder, when created by MemoryManager without explicit configuration, shall load ragstream/config/runtime_config.json through its own configuration loader.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.3
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-REDUCER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-REDUCER
        Consumed ActiveBrief Reducer Settings
        Current ActiveBrief generation shall consume reducer max_tokens_total, question_max_tokens, window size, window overlap, redundancy threshold, and embedding model.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.4
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-GATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-GATE
        Consumed ActiveBrief Gate Settings
        Current ActiveBrief generation shall consume gate enabled, activebrief_threshold, and pending_topic_threshold.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.5
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LLM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LLM
        Consumed ActiveBrief LLM Settings
        Current ActiveBrief generation shall consume agent_id, init agent version, update agent version, target_brief_tokens, and prompt_cache_key from the ActiveBrief LLM configuration section.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.6
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-COMPRESS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-COMPRESS
        Consumed Compression Settings
        Current runtime compression shall consume effective-query token limit and embedding model plus episodic enablement, total budget, question budget, window size, overlap, and redundancy threshold.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.7
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-SYNTH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-SYNTH
        Consumed Synthesis Settings
        Current MemoryMergeSynthesizer shall consume enabled, agent identity/version, target context tokens, episodic cap, semantic chunk cap, and prompt-cache key.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.8
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-AGENT-AUTHORITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-AGENT-AUTHORITY
        Agent Definition Authority
        Provider, model, temperature, provider maximum output tokens, dynamic bindings, static rules, and structured output schema shall remain owned by the corresponding versioned agent JSON definitions.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.9
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-NO-HIDDEN-OVERRIDE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-CONFIG AC: Configuration Consumption Truth
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-NO-HIDDEN-OVERRIDE
        No Hidden Configuration Override
        A Python fallback value shall not be represented as JSON-controlled when the active runtime does not read the corresponding JSON field.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.10
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-MIGRATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-MIGRATION
        Operational Parameter Migration
        Remaining tunable thresholds, token budgets, model identifiers, window parameters, and evidence caps shall be kept or migrated into validated versioned JSON rather than multiplied as unrelated hard-coded runtime values.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.11
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-VALIDATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-VALIDATION
        Configuration Validation Requirement
        Configuration loading shall reject or explicitly normalize invalid negative budgets, invalid window relationships, invalid threshold ranges, and missing required agent identities before those values silently alter memory behavior.
        SECTION
        		15
        15. Error Handling, Logging, and Quality Requirements
        TEXT
        The memory transformation path must preserve durable truth and expose decisions without leaking full memory content by default.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.1
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-DURABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-DURABLE
        Transformation Failure Does Not Rewrite Truth
        A reducer, relevance-gate, ActiveBrief agent, compressor, or synthesis failure shall not rewrite prior .ragmem records, .ragmeta.json metadata, SQLite rows, or stored vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.2
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-EMPTY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-EMPTY
        Empty Runtime Result Is Explicit
        A skipped or failed synthesis shall return empty memory_context with diagnostics rather than an ambiguous fabricated success.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.3
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-ACTIVE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-ACTIVE
        ActiveBrief Error Visibility
        ActiveBrief builder failures shall be available to explicitly enabled developer logging even though current MemoryManager capture continues.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.4
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-PUBLIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-PUBLIC
        Public Logging Boundary
        Public logs shall not expose complete memory Q/A bodies, ActiveBrief bodies, synthesis evidence, provider messages, raw model output, or embedding vectors by default.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.5
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-DEVELOPER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-DEVELOPER
        Developer Diagnostic Boundary
        Complete reduction, gate, agent payload, raw response, and synthesis snapshots shall remain behind explicitly enabled confidential developer logging.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.6
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-GATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-GATE
        Gate Log Summaries
        The gate log view shall report score summaries, counts, routes, and bounded text previews and shall not require full vector values.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.7
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-DETERMINISTIC-TEST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-DETERMINISTIC-TEST
        Deterministic Component Testability
        Sentence splitting, window formation, token allocation, centroid, cosine, redundancy filtering, top-score count, threshold routing, contributor merging, query reduction, and evidence formatting shall be independently testable.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.8
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AGENT-TEST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AGENT-TEST
        Agent Contract Testability
        ActiveBrief and Memory Context agent definitions shall be testable for declared bindings, output fields, no-answer behavior, and rejection of undeclared output structure.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.9
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-REPRODUCIBILITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-REPRODUCIBILITY
        Decision Reproducibility
        Diagnostics shall preserve configuration version or effective values, route, thresholds, selected counts, contributor IDs, and agent identity sufficiently to reproduce a transformation decision.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.10
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-OUTSIDE-KNOWLEDGE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-OUTSIDE-KNOWLEDGE
        No Outside Knowledge in Memory Artifacts
        ActiveBrief and Memory Context outputs shall be grounded in supplied memory evidence and shall not add external facts solely from model knowledge.
        REQUIREMENT
        		15.11
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-SEMANTIC-GUARANTEE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-SEMANTIC-GUARANTEE
        LLM Compression Nature
        An LLM-produced ActiveBrief or memory_context shall be treated as a compressed runtime artifact and shall not be represented as a verbatim or complete copy of all source evidence.
        SECTION
        		16
        16. Blackboard and Future Development Boundary
        TEXT
        The filename reserves an architectural boundary for future coordination, but the current implementation does not contain a Blackboard subsystem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.1
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PACK-NOT MemoryContextPack Is Not Blackboard
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-EXTRAS-NOT SuperPrompt Extras Are Not Blackboard
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PENDING-NOT Pending Topic State Is Not Blackboard
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-BACKGROUND No Background Coordination Agents
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH No Current Knowledge Graph
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-CROSS-CONTEXT-DEDUPE No Knowledge-Memory Overlap Resolver
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-ACTIVEBRIEF-ANTI-DUP Current Anti-Duplication Limit
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-FUTURE-OWNERSHIP Future Blackboard Ownership
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-CURRENT-ACCEPTANCE Current Baseline Independence
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-BLACKBOARD AC: Blackboard Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED
        No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        The current Memory Management implementation shall not be described as providing a Blackboard coordinator, shared Blackboard schema, posting protocol, task queue, subscription mechanism, or conflict-resolution engine.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.2
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PACK-NOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PACK-NOT
        MemoryContextPack Is Not Blackboard
        MemoryContextPack shall be described as a run-local typed candidate container and not as a Blackboard implementation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.3
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-EXTRAS-NOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-EXTRAS-NOT
        SuperPrompt Extras Are Not Blackboard
        SuperPrompt.extras shall be described as runtime auxiliary state and not as a Blackboard merely because multiple components write namespaced values into it.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.4
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PENDING-NOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PENDING-NOT
        Pending Topic State Is Not Blackboard
        The ActiveBrief pending-topic buffer shall remain a private continuity state and shall not imply a general shared-agent workspace.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.5
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-BACKGROUND
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-BACKGROUND
        No Background Coordination Agents
        This document shall not claim current background agents that monitor, reconcile, or update memory, knowledge, requirements, architecture, code, or tests.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.6
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH
        No Current Knowledge Graph
        This document shall not claim a current knowledge graph, graph traversal memory retrieval, graph persistence, or graph-based conflict resolution.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.7
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-CROSS-CONTEXT-DEDUPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-CROSS-CONTEXT-DEDUPE
        No Knowledge-Memory Overlap Resolver
        The current implementation shall not be described as deterministically comparing final Knowledge Context and Memory Context and removing cross-path overlap.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.8
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-ACTIVEBRIEF-ANTI-DUP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-ACTIVEBRIEF-ANTI-DUP
        Current Anti-Duplication Limit
        The current ActiveBrief reference to MemoryMerge may guide the LLM away from repetition inside Memory Context; it shall not be treated as the future cross-path overlap-removal capability.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.9
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-FUTURE-OWNERSHIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-FUTURE-OWNERSHIP
        Future Blackboard Ownership
        Any future Blackboard, cross-context reconciliation, knowledge graph, background synchronization, or autonomous coordination capability shall require separately approved requirements and architecture, expected under the future-vision requirement family rather than inferred from this current document.
        REQUIREMENT
        		16.10
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-CURRENT-ACCEPTANCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-CURRENT-ACCEPTANCE
        Current Baseline Independence
        Acceptance of the current 50–53 Memory Management baseline shall not depend on implementation of a Blackboard, knowledge graph, background agent, or cross-path overlap resolver.
        SECTION
        		17
        17. Traceability and Acceptance Criteria
        TEXT
        These criteria verify ActiveBrief continuity, deterministic reduction and routing, query-dependent compression, evidence-limited synthesis, and current Blackboard exclusion.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.1
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-CODE-OWNERSHIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNC AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-CODE-OWNERSHIP
        Memory Merge Code Ownership
        MemorySentenceReducer, MemoryActiveBriefRelevanceGate, MemoryActiveRetrievalBriefBuilder, MemoryCompressor, MemoryMergeSynthesizer, and the associated memory agent JSON definitions shall map to the deepest applicable UIDs in this document.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.2
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
        Sibling Ownership Boundary
        MemoryRecord and file persistence shall remain owned by 51; vector ingestion, candidate retrieval, scoring, and MemoryContextPack construction shall remain owned by 52.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.3
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-INIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT Initial Brief Route
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-INIT
        AC: Initial ActiveBrief
        Given a first captured record with reducible Q/A and a successful init agent response, the new record shall contain the returned title/body and contributor list containing only its record_id before .ragmem append.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.4
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RELATED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NORMAL-UPDATE Related ActiveBrief Update Route
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RELATED
        AC: Related ActiveBrief Update
        Given a previous clean brief and current Q/A whose ActiveBrief top-score mean meets threshold, the update agent shall run, contributor IDs shall include the current record, and pending state shall clear.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.5
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SKIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP Unrelated Q/A Skip Route
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SKIP
        AC: Unrelated Q/A Skip
        Given current Q/A that fails ActiveBrief and pending-topic thresholds, no ActiveBrief LLM call shall run, the previous brief shall be copied, and the current Q/A shall replace pending-topic state.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.6
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPIC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPIC
        AC: Confirmed Topic Shift
        Given a pending skipped Q/A and a current Q/A meeting pending_topic_threshold while failing the old ActiveBrief threshold, the update agent payload shall include both labeled Q/A pairs and contributors shall include pending and current record IDs.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.7
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-BLACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-BLACK-CONTRIBUTOR Reject Brief with Black Contributor
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-BLACK
        AC: Black Contributor Exclusion
        Given a previous brief whose contributor is currently Black, the builder shall skip that brief when selecting previous clean continuity state.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.8
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-REDUCER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ORDER Original Sentence Order Restoration
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-REDUCER
        AC: Reducer Order and Budget
        Given over-budget Q/A with multiple windows, selected text shall remain within allocated budgets, redundant windows shall be excluded at threshold, and reconstructed sentences shall follow source order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.9
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPCOUNT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-LARGE Top-Score Selection Above Twenty
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPCOUNT
        AC: Gate Top-Score Counts
        Gate tests at n equal to 4, 5, 20, 21, and 25 shall use 4, 4, 4, 4, and 5 top scores respectively.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.10
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-COMPRESS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-PRESERVE-ORIGINAL Original Episodic Text Preservation
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-COMPRESS
        AC: Query-Anchored Episodic Compression
        Given enabled compression, a non-empty query anchor, and selected episodic candidates, each result shall preserve original Q/A and add query_anchor_episode compressed fields and diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.11
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNTH-INPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES Current Synthesized Evidence Classes
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNTH-INPUT
        AC: Current Synthesis Evidence Classes
        A synthesis payload shall include bounded episodic and semantic evidence but shall not include working-memory or Direct Recall candidates in memory_evidence under the current implementation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.12
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-EVIDENCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-EVIDENCE No Evidence Skip
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-EVIDENCE
        AC: Empty Evidence
        With no formatted episodic or semantic evidence, no synthesis LLM call shall run and returned memory_context shall be empty with no_memory_evidence diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.13
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-FAILURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-FAILURE Synthesis Failure Result
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-FAILURE
        AC: Synthesis Failure
        When the Memory Context provider call or parse fails, the result shall contain empty memory_context, synthesis_failed diagnostics, and memory_synthesis_llm_skipped true.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.14
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-HANDOFF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SP-TEXT SuperPrompt Memory Context Text
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-HANDOFF
        AC: SuperPrompt Memory Handoff
        After successful memory synthesis, SuperPrompt.memory_context_text shall equal MemoryContextPack.synthesized_memory_context while document stage artifacts remain unchanged.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.15
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-PERMISSION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PERMISSION Memory Context Permission Dependency
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-PERMISSION
        AC: Memory Permission
        When PreProcessing disables memory context, no synthesized memory context shall be rendered in the final SuperPrompt for that request.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.16
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RUNTIME-ONLY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-PERSIST No Runtime Context Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RUNTIME-ONLY
        AC: Runtime Artifact Non-Persistence
        After a retrieval run, compressed candidate fields and synthesized memory_context shall not appear as rewritten content in existing .ragmem records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.17
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-BLACKBOARD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-BLACKBOARD
        AC: Blackboard Boundary
        Inspection of the current baseline shall not identify MemoryContextPack, SuperPrompt.extras, or pending-topic state as satisfying a Blackboard protocol or shared coordination subsystem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.18
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-CONFIG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-NO-HIDDEN-OVERRIDE No Hidden Configuration Override
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-CONFIG
        AC: Configuration Consumption Truth
        Changing a consumed memory transformation setting shall be observable in reduction, route, cap, or diagnostics; an unconsumed or contradictory field shall not be represented as effective without code evidence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		17.19
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-CODE-OWNERSHIP Memory Merge Code Ownership
        GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNC
        AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
        The 53 baseline shall not be accepted when recording position, reduction behavior, gate route, pending-state lifecycle, contributor trace, synthesis evidence classes, output schema, persistence boundary, or Blackboard status contradicts this document.
        Built with StrictDoc 0.25.0
